ger_mapping: GER-321: Reasoning Step Skipped / Authority Hierarchy Misapplied
claim_definition: System-level controls (such as configured harmony tolerance) prioritize safety and cannot be overridden by proposed mutations, forcing gate closure when thresholds are violated.

test_cases.description: Verifies that system-level safety checks fail-close the gate immediately when a corruption event is introduced, ignoring any continuation.
